name: Instagram Configure Bio
description: Opens Instagram, navigates to Edit Profile, clears the existing bio, and types a new bio.

params.bio: The bio text to set on the profile

steps.goal: Open Instagram. Tap the profile tab (bottom-right icon). Then tap 'Edit profile' button. Wait for the Edit Profile screen to load.

You are on the Edit Profile screen. Find the Bio field — it is a text field that may contain existing bio text or say 'Bio'. Tap on the Bio field to open it. You should see an editable text area. Select all existing text and delete it (clear the field completely). Then type the following bio exactly: '{{bio}}'. Verify the text appears in the field.
The bio field should now contain the new text. Tap the checkmark or 'Done' button (top-right corner) to save the changes. Wait for the profile to update, then mark done.
